description: You are a residential building inspector. You just completed a pre-purchase property inspection and typed your field notes as plain text into a Calligra Words document at /home/ga/Documents/inspection_report.odt. Before delivering this to the home buyer, you must format it according to ASHI (American Society of Home Inspectors) formatting conventions. A formatting specification guide has been placed at /home/ga/Desktop/ashi_report_format.txt. Your task is to format the document according to the ASHI specifications found on the desktop, including report titles, headings, condition tables, and body text formatting. Save the document at /home/ga/Documents/inspection_report.odt when complete.

body_alignment_samples: The inspection was performed in accordance with ASHI Standards of Practice
Minor efflorescence was noted on the interior foundation wall
The asphalt shingle roof covering appears to be in the second half of its design life
Galvanic corrosion was observed at the water heater connection
GFCI protection is missing at the kitchen island receptacle
